title: spigelia sellowiana
intro: Spigelia sellowiana, also known as the worm grass or Indian pink, is a perennial plant native to the southeastern United States and Central America, belonging to the Loganiaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Spigelia sellowiana include relief from fever, rheumatism, and anxiety, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to address these health issues.
